title: arctium cymbolepis
intro: Arctium cymbolepis, also known as the bur marigold or lesser burdock, is a biennial plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce fever. The health benefits of Arctium cymbolepis include its ability to support digestive health, reduce swelling, and promote the removal of toxins from the body. Arctium cymbolepis can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
